title: Jayalakshmi Song Lyrics Saithan
stanzas:
nee yaar theriyuma
naan sonnal puriyumo
unnai kolai seitha
kolai kaari avalai
nyabagam irukkudha ?

kaalam kadanthume
un kaayam aaruma ?
yematra pattu valiyodu setha
drogam marakuma
poorva jenmathil unnai
jayalakshmi thaan kondraal
indha jenmathil naam
avalai kollaam vaa

nee kondra pinnal sethu pogum
aval poga vendum naragam
aval paasam nesam ellam vesam
vaa avalai kollam vaa

unnai vaatti vadhaitha avalin
moochu kaattrai anaithuvittu
theeyai mootti varuthu vaatti
avalin kadhaiyai mudithuvidu

nettru varai aval vaazhndha vaazhvil
unakkum unmaiyaai irundhadhillai
namba vaithu kaluthai arutha
avalin uyirai kudithuvidu

azhagaai irupaal
nee mayanga vendam
avalai kolla
nee thayanga vendam
kondruvidu kondruvidu..
avalai kondruvidu..
jayalakshmi...

seo.title: Jayalakshmi Song Lyrics Saithan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the Jayalakshmi song?

The song explores themes of past life connections and unresolved emotions, creating a mysterious and melancholic atmosphere.

Who composed the music for Saithan?

Vijay Antony composed the music for the movie Saithan.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song is pivotal in highlighting the protagonist's internal struggles and the haunting memories of his past life.

Who is the singer of Jayalakshmi?

The song is sung by Yazin.

When was the movie Saithan released?

The movie Saithan was released in 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Jayalakshmi from Saithan captures the eerie and melancholic essence of the film's storyline, which revolves around past life connections and unresolved mysteries. Sung by Yazin, the song's haunting lyrics penned by Annamalai evoke a sense of sadness and intrigue. Vijay Antony's composition enhances the mysterious vibe, making it a perfect fit for the film's suspenseful narrative. The song conveys the protagonist's internal turmoil and the haunting memories that refuse to fade away, leaving a lasting impact on the listener.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Jayalakshmi from the movie Saithan is a haunting melody that delves into the depths of past life connections and unresolved mysteries. Yazin's evocative vocals combined with Vijay Antony's gripping composition create an atmosphere of intrigue and melancholy. This song stands out for its unique blend of emotional intensity and lyrical depth, making it a must-listen for fans of suspenseful soundtracks.
stanzaMeanings: Do you know who you are? Will you understand if I tell you? Do you remember the murderer who killed you?
Even after time passes, will your wounds heal? Will the betrayal that died with pain be forgotten? In a past life, Jayalakshmi killed you. In this life, we will kill her. Come.
After you killed, she will die too. She must go to hell. Her love and affection are all fake. Come, let's kill her.
The breath of the one who tortured you is gone. The fire is rising. End her story.
Until yesterday, in the life she lived, there was no truth for you. Trust and cut her throat. Drink her life away.
She is beautiful, but don't be swayed. Don't hesitate to kill her. Kill her, kill her... kill her... Jayalakshmi...
